overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in colonial-era attire exploring a hazy Caribbean town with stone architecture, palm trees, and dirt streets. The character walks through covered arcades, open courtyards, and narrow alleys while passing various NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: colonial town street with classical stone architecture

events.description: character turns right into a narrower street with wooden shutters
approaching entrance to covered walkway with checkered floor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through colonial streets, passing citizens in period clothing while approaching a covered arcade

notable_agents.action: colonial citizen in dark clothing walking along the left side of the street
woman in a dress standing near the building entrance ahead

entered.detail: large stone building with classical arches and columns dominating the street view
tall weathered stone columns supporting a building overhang
unpaved dirt street with patches of grass and gravel
wooden ladder leaning against a blue painted building wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a hazy colonial street lined with classical stone architecture. The dirt road is flanked by buildings with tall columns, and a wooden ladder leans against a blue wall on the right. Several NPCs in period clothing walk along the street as the character approaches a covered arcade entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonial walkway with checkered tile flooring

events.description: enters covered walkway with checkered tile floor and stone arches
exits covered arcade into open courtyard with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade with checkered floor, passing under stone arches toward the exit

notable_agents.action: colonial citizen walking ahead through the covered walkway

entered.detail: covered stone walkway with arched ceiling and hanging lanterns
red and white checkered tile pattern covering the ground
closed wooden shutters with metal bars on building windows

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered stone walkway with a distinctive red and white checkered tile floor. The space is sheltered with stone arches overhead and wooden shutters visible on the right. After passing through, the character emerges into a brighter open courtyard where palm trees become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with palm trees and colorful colonial buildings

events.description: character turns left around a large palm tree in the courtyard
passing a wooden cart loaded with goods on the right side

agents.ego_description: navigating through the open courtyard, walking around groups of NPCs and passing a large palm tree

notable_agents.action: group of three colonial citizens conversing near the palm tree
citizen in red coat walking across the character's path

entered.detail: two-story building with bright blue painted walls and arched doorways
tall palm tree with thick trunk and green fronds in the courtyard center
wooden wagon with large wheels parked on the side
circular stone structure in the courtyard center

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a sunlit open courtyard with cobblestone ground and a large palm tree. Bright blue colonial buildings line the right side while groups of NPCs gather near the tree. The character passes a wooden cart and navigates around citizens before approaching another covered entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: blue painted corridor leading to inner courtyard

events.description: enters narrow corridor with bright blue walls and checkered floor
exits blue corridor into sunlit courtyard with stone buildings and hay cart

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow blue-painted corridor and emerging into a courtyard with a hay cart and stone arches

notable_agents.action: colonial guard standing near the wall in the courtyard

entered.detail: narrow passage with vibrant blue painted walls and checkered tile floor
wooden cart loaded with hay bales parked against the wall
long stone building with repeating arches and wooden barrels stacked nearby

segments.scene_description: The character enters a striking narrow corridor with bright blue walls and checkered flooring, then emerges into a sunlit inner courtyard. A hay cart sits on the right next to a long stone building with repeating arches. The ground transitions from tiles back to dirt as the character continues through the historic town.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy colonial town that transitions from shaded stone corridors into bright, sunlit courtyards. It begins on a dusty street lined with classical columns and period NPCs, moving past a blue wall with a leaning wooden ladder toward a sheltered entrance. As the character enters a covered walkway, the environment shifts to a red and white checkered floor beneath stone arches before opening up into a brilliant courtyard featuring a large palm tree and vibrant blue buildings. The scene then narrows into a striking blue corridor with checkered tiling, finally emerging into a second sunlit inner courtyard where the ground transitions from tiles back to dirt beside a hay cart and a long arched building.
